title: The National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988
full_text: The National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988 भारतीय राष्‍ट्रीय राजमार्ग प्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 1988 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198868 Act Number: 68 Enactment Date: 1988-12-16 Act Year: 1988 Short Title: The National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988 Hindi Title: भारतीय राष्‍ट्रीय राजमार्ग प्राधिकरण अधिनियम, 1988 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of an Authority for the development, maintenance and management of national highways and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways Enforcement Date: 15-06-1989 Notification: 15th June, 1989, vide notification No. S.O. 451(E), dated 15th June, 1989, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The National Highways Authority of India Act, 1988 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE NATIONAL HIGHWAYS AUTHORITY OF INDIA CHAPTER III PROPERTY AND CONTRACTS CHAPTER IV FUNCTIONS OF THE AUTHORITY CHAPTER V FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER VI MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Constitution of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Term of office and conditions of service of members. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Disqualifications for appointment as member. Show Related Subordinates Section 6. Eligibility of member for reappointment. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Meetings. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Vacancy in the Authority not to invalidate proceedings. Section 9. Appointment of officers, consultants and other employees of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Authority to act on business principles. Section 11. Power of the Central Government to vest or entrust any national highway in the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 12. Transfer of assets and liabilities of the Central Government to the Authority. Section 13. Compulsory acquisition of land for the Authority. Section 14. Contracts by the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 15. Mode of executing contracts on behalf of the Authority. Section 16. Functions of the Authority. Section 17. Additional capital and Grants to the Authority by the Central Government. Section 18. Fund of the Authority. Section 19. Budget. Section 20. Investment of funds. Section 21. Borrowing powers of the Authority. Section 22. Annual report. Section 23. Accounts and audit. Show Related Subordinates Section 24. Annual report and auditor’s report to be laid before Parliament. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. Delegation of powers. Show Related Subordinates Section 26. Authentication of orders and other instruments of the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 27. Employees of the Authority to be public servants. Show Related Subordinates Section 28. Protection of action taken in good faith. Show Related Subordinates Section 29. Power of the Authority to undertake certain works. Show Related Subordinates Section 30. Power to enter. Section 31. Power of the Central Government to temporarily divest the Authority of the management of any national highway. Section 32. Power of the Central Government to supersede the Authority. Show Related Subordinates Section 33. Power of the Central Government to issue directions. Section 34. Power of the Central Government to made rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 35. Power of the Authority to make regulations. Show Related Subordinates Section 36. Power to remove difficulties. Section 37. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament.
